problem id: d582c492
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11110010 -> 10111110
  10100101 -> 01010110
  11110011 -> 10111110
  01111111 -> 11111111
  11000000 -> 11111001
  01110010 -> 10101110
  11010001 -> 00111111
  11011000 -> 01011011
  11101110 -> 00111101
  10111111 -> 11111111

query: 10010101
predicted answer: 00010111
